name: feature-cycle
description: Run the full harness stage machine (Understand -> Architect -> Implement -> Review -> Feedback) for a feature until reviews are clean and validation is green.
rubric: Stage 0 ran: graph freshness checked and a component/layer impact map exists.
Stage 1 ran: an Architecture Brief exists with gate decisions, constraints, and Do-NOTs.
Stage 2 ran: the implementation followed the Brief and its self-review checklist is complete.
The inner review-fix loop reached terminal state 'converged'.
The validation matrix is green for every touched scope.
The completion summary includes the Understand status line (graph status, tools used, residual risk).
fixPrompt: Each iteration runs the stage machine from .github/harness/HARNESS.md: (0) Understand — graph freshness and impact map. (1) Architect — gates 1-5, produce the Architecture Brief. (2) Implement — follow the Brief with discovery and self-review, loading the domain skills the change touches (backend-service, frontend-component, testing, etc.). (3+4) Run the review-fix loop (loops/review-fix.json) as the inner loop. (5) Close out per 07-FEEDBACK if review challenged Brief decisions. The cycle converges when the inner review-fix loop converges AND the validation matrix for all touched scopes is green. A second iteration of this outer loop happens only if review-depth invalidates the Brief itself.
guardrails: Do not skip stage 0 or stage 1 for non-trivial work — implementing without a Brief invalidates the cycle.
Artifacts carry forward: the Brief feeds Implement and Review-Depth; breadth findings feed depth.
End with the Understand status line (graph status, tools used, residual risk).
onExhausted: Stop. The Brief has been invalidated twice — report the conflicting gate decisions and ask the user to arbitrate the architecture before any further implementation.
